title: NG24 2ER, Bakkavor Foods Ltd : environmental permit issued -  EPR/KP3332GH/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:   Operator name: Bakkavor Foods Ltd Installation name: Newark Dessert Factory Permit number: EPR/KP3332GH/V004  "
